                              3

stem.rawText:
Find the value of

                         4
                              3 − 2x
                                √ dx
                         1     x x

solution.rawText:
We write the integrand (the thing being integrated) in terms of powers of x and split up the
fraction in order to be able to compute the integral:
                      Z 4             Z 4
                          3 − 2x          3 − 2x
                            √ dx =               3   dx
                       1   x x          1     x2
                                      Z 4
                                                  3        1
                                    =     3x− 2 − 2x− 2 dx
                                        1
                                      "       1        1
                                                         #4
                                        3x− 2       2x 2
                                    =            − 1
                                        (− 12 )      2     1
                                                1       1 4
                                             −2
                                      
                                    = −6x − 4x 1        2


                                  = (−6 × 12 − 4 × 2) − (−6 × 1 − 4 × 1)
                                  = −11 − (−10)
                                  = −1

so the correct answer is D.
